name: Maple Syrup Mousse
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring maple syrup to a fast rolling boil, then boil for 3 minutes and cool for 5 minutes.
2. Beat the egg yolks until light and pale yellow.
3. Pour the boiling syrup slowly over the egg yolks, beating constantly.
4. Cook the mixture over very low heat until it has the texture of a custard. Stir constantly and do not boil.
5. Allow the mixture to cool completely.
6. Whip the cream and egg whites until stiff.
7. Gently fold the whipped ingredients into the cooled custard.
8. Pour the mixture into an oiled mold.
9. Cover with foil paper and place in the freezer.
10. Remove from the refrigerator 15-20 minutes before serving.
11. Top with a small macaroon or whipped cream.
